zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Seymour於1474年出生在英國維爾爾布爾巴時，他的父親John Seymour24歲，母親Elizabeth Darell20歲。他於1494年10月22日與Margery Wentworth在英國維爾爾布爾巴結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1536年12月21日在英國維爾爾格亞特 貝德享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾格亞特 貝德。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Seymour was born in 1474, in Burbage, Wiltshire, England, his father, John Seymour, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Darell, was 20. He married Margery Wentworth on 22 October 1494, in Burbage, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 December 1536, in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Seymour est né en 1474, à Burbage, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John Seymour, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Darell, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margery Wentworth le 22 octobre 1494, à Burbage, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 décembre 1536, à Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Seymourが1474年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブルバッジで生まれた時，父John Seymourは24歳，母Elizabeth Darellは20歳であった。1494年10月22日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブルバッジでMargery Wentworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1536年12月21日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアグレアト ベドウインで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアグレアト ベドウインにて埋葬された。

ko.Savernake, Wiltshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 소우스 새버나크 위스 브림슬라드 앤드 카들리
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Seymour(이)가 1474년 영국 윌츠히르 버바지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Seymour(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Darell(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1494년 10월 22일 영국 윌츠히르 버바지에서 Margery Wentworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1536년 12월 21일 영국 윌츠히르 그리트 베드윈에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 그리트 베드윈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Seymour nasceu em 1474, em Burbage, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Seymour, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Darell, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Wentworth em 22 de outubro de 1494, em Burbage, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1536, em Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Savernake, Wiltshire, England: соут савирнеик вит бримслад анд кадли, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Seymour родился в 1474 г. в местности бурбадж, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Seymour было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Darell, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Wentworth 22 октября 1494 г. в местности бурбадж, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 декабря 1536 г. в местности грит бедуин, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности грит бедуин, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Seymour nació en 1474, en Burbage, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Seymour, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Darell, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margery Wentworth el 22 de octubre de 1494, en Burbage, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1536, en Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
